posts.title: Hello Hexo
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

pages.title: About Me
pages.text: My ID On The InternetMisakaBit Contact MeMisakaBit@gmail.com Currently Gap year 🍥 Transforming into the direction of scientific research. After the transformation, will study the direction of game development and brain-computer interface Worked for a cybersecurity company, as a research and development staff Research Direction Games：ARPG、MMORPG、FPS、Cute、Sandbox、business Language：Chinese、English OS：Windows、Linux、macOS Programming Language：C、C++、Golang、Python Programming Direction：Game/Game Engine/Game Physics Engine/CG/VR、Natural Language Processing、Cybersecurity、Crawer、Web Scientific Research Direction：3D Graphics/Game Physics

pages.title: 关于我
pages.text: 站主IDMisakaBit、星晚、叽翅 联系方式MisakaBit@gmail.com 近况 Gap year 🍥 正在往科研方向做转型，转型后将研究游戏研发方向与脑机接口方向 曾经供职于一家安全公司，是一名研发人员 研究方向 游戏：ARPG、MMORPG、FPS、Q版、沙盒、经营类 语言：中文、English 操作系统：Windows、Linux、macOS 编程语言：C、C++、Golang、Python 编程方向：游戏/游戏引擎/游戏物理引擎/图形学/VR、NLP、网安、爬虫、Web 科研方向：3D图形学和游戏物理学
